2026-03-16T09:35:22.0534252Z   `@pnpm` to `pnpm` (the `@pnpm` scoped package does not exist on npm)
2026-03-16T09:35:22.0534528Z 
2026-03-16T09:35:22.0534752Z - resolve-pnpm-lock-merge-conflict.md: add missing `/` path separator
2026-03-16T09:35:22.0535196Z   in the `git add` command so that the path correctly reads
2026-03-16T09:35:22.0537002Z   `$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/pnpm-lock.yaml`
2026-03-16T09:35:22.0537270Z 
2026-03-16T09:35:22.0537489Z - Quickstart-on-how-to-write-tests.md: replace outdated mocha/chai
2026-03-16T09:35:22.0537947Z   patterns with vitest equivalents in both code examples:
2026-03-16T09:35:22.0540095Z   - Replace `import { assert } from "chai"` with
2026-03-16T09:35:22.0540570Z     `import { assert, describe, it, beforeEach, afterEach } from "vitest"`
2026-03-16T09:35:22.0541059Z   - Replace `import { Context } from "mocha"` and `context.currentTest`
2026-03-16T09:35:22.0542821Z     with `VitestTestContext` from `@azure-tools/test-recorder` and pass
2026-03-16T09:35:22.0543318Z     context directly to `new Recorder(context)`
2026-03-16T09:35:22.0544496Z   - Update `beforeEach`/`afterEach`/`it` callback signatures from mocha
2026-03-16T09:35:22.0545821Z     `function(this: Context)` style to vitest arrow-function `(ctx) =>` style
2026-03-16T09:35:22.0547672Z
